Feishu thread history and quoted messages bypass sender allowlist

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: medium
- Assessment: Real in shipped v2026.3.28 Feishu because fetched quoted/root/thread context bypasses sender allowlists, and SECURITY.md does not exempt remote sender-allowlist bypasses.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `f45e5a6569aab1d58cc6de25b19f1dc4c8779b85` — 2026-03-31T19:43:54+09:00

## Release Process Note
- The fix is already present in released version `2026.3.31`.
- This draft looks ready for final maintainer disposition or publication, not additional code-fix work.

OpenClaw thanks @AntAISecurityLab for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00225, "percentile": 0.13008}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-02T20:59:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41406"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:44Z", "published_at": "2026-04-02T20:59:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/f45e5a6569aab1d58cc6de25b19f1dc4c8779b85", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41406", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-sender-allowlist-bypass-via-thread-history-and-quoted-messages", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Feishu thread history and quoted messages bypass sender allowlist", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T02:40:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-877v-w3f5-3pcq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
